findings.title: No subcontractor_invoices table
findings.description: Procore's Subcontractor Invoicing workflow requires a dedicated table. No such table exists. Frontend tab marked 'coming soon'.

findings.title: No PO/subcontract invoice requisition snapshot table
findings.description: Procore PO Invoices tab shows per-invoice financial snapshots (15 columns). purchase_order_sov_items only stores running totals, not per-period snapshots. No commitment invoice requisition table exists.

findings.title: invoice_status DB enum missing Procore status values
findings.description: DB enum has: draft, pending, approved, paid, void. Procore uses: DRAFT, UNDER_REVIEW, APPROVED, REVISE_AND_RESUBMIT (owner); NOT_INVITED, INVITED, UNDER_REVIEW, APPROVED, REVISE_AND_RESUBMIT (subcontractor). under_review, revise_and_resubmit, not_invited, invited all missing.

findings.title: owner_invoices.status is unconstrained string not typed enum
findings.description: owner_invoices.status typed as string|null in DB types — not constrained to invoice_status enum. Invalid values can be inserted without error.

findings.title: owner_invoices missing gross_amount column
findings.description: No gross_amount column. Value requires aggregate join from owner_invoice_line_items. Prevents efficient list rendering and sorting.

findings.title: owner_invoices missing net_amount column
findings.description: No net_amount column on owner_invoices.

findings.title: owner_invoices missing paid_amount and no payment tracking table
findings.description: No paid_amount on owner_invoices. No payment recording table for owner invoices.

findings.title: owner_invoices missing percent_complete column
findings.description: No percent_complete field. Must be computed at query time from SOV line items — prevents list sorting.

findings.title: owner_invoices missing company FK for 'Company' column
findings.description: No company_id FK. Must resolve via owner_invoices → prime_contracts → company — extra join on every list query. Also blocks Prime Contract filter.

findings.title: No ERP status column at invoice level for subcontractor invoices
findings.description: erp_status exists at contract level but not invoice level. Invoice-level ERP sync state cannot be tracked.

findings.title: No invitation tracking columns for subcontractor invoice workflow
findings.description: Procore has NOT_INVITED and INVITED statuses. No table tracks whether a subcontractor has been invited to submit for a billing period.

findings.title: billing_periods uses boolean is_closed instead of status enum
findings.description: Uses is_closed boolean instead of status enum. Cannot support future states (draft, locked, under_review).

findings.title: billing_periods missing prime_contract_id FK
findings.description: billing_periods links only to projects. Procore billing periods are scoped to a prime contract. Cannot filter billing periods by prime contract efficiently.
findings.procore_field: list filter — Prime Contract + Billing Period

findings.title: purchase_order_sov_items missing stored_materials per line
findings.description: No stored_materials column per SOV line. Only total at contract_billing_periods level.
findings.procore_field: po_invoices — Total Completed and Stored To Date

findings.title: No invoice_position (requisition sequence number) column
findings.description: Procore has Invoice Position — sequential system-generated number per contract invoice history. No equivalent exists.

findings.title: billing_periods missing name/label column
findings.description: No name column — display names must be constructed at query time from date columns.
findings.procore_field: list filter — Billing Period select display name

findings.title: Two overlapping billing period tables with no enforced relationship
findings.description: billing_periods (project-scoped) and contract_billing_periods (prime_contract-scoped) overlap with no FK enforcing consistency.

findings.title: No index on owner_invoices.status
findings.description: Status column has no index. Only existing index is on prime_contract_id. Status-filtered queries will full scan.

findings.title: No index on owner_invoices.billing_period_id
findings.description: billing_period_id FK has no index. Combined with DB-018, common list queries will full scan.

findings.title: subcontract_sov_items missing unit_cost, quantity, uom columns
findings.description: purchase_order_sov_items has all three; subcontract_sov_items does not. Inconsistent schema between PO and subcontract SOV items.

findings.title: owner_invoice_line_items missing quantity, unit_cost, uom columns
findings.description: Only has approved_amount, description, category. Cannot represent AIA G702/G703 unit-cost breakdowns.
findings.procore_field: po_invoices — SOV line item unit cost detail

findings.title: owner_invoices missing due_date column
findings.description: Has period_start and period_end but no due_date. acumatica_ar_invoices has due_date but owner_invoices does not.

findings.title: owner_invoices missing billing_date column
findings.description: No billing_date distinct from period start/end dates.

findings.title: billing_periods missing created_by audit column
findings.description: Has closed_by but no created_by for audit trail.

findings.title: No invoice_attachments table
findings.description: PO invoices list has Attachments column per row. No attachments junction table for invoices.

findings.title: No subcontractor invoice routes exist
findings.description: Full subcontractor invoicing workflow missing. Procore has dedicated list with 5 filters (billing_period, contract_company, payment_status, invoice_status, contract_type), status bar (NOT INVITED, INVITED, UNDER REVIEW, APPROVED, REVISE AND RESUBMIT), ERP Status column, and bulk actions. No routes exist under /api/projects/[projectId]/invoicing/subcontractor. Frontend tab marked 'coming soon'.

findings.title: No owner invoice line items CRUD endpoints
findings.description: No endpoints to create, update, or delete individual line items. InvoiceLineItemsTable is read-only with hardcoded 5% retention. Without line item CRUD, invoices always show $0 totals. The Procore AIA G702/G703 workflow is entirely built around editing SOV line items per invoice.

findings.title: Broken FK join in owner invoice GET/PATCH/DELETE — uses 'contracts' not 'prime_contracts'
findings.description: Owner invoice routes join using 'contracts!inner(project_id)' but owner_invoices.prime_contract_id points to 'prime_contracts' table. All GET, PATCH, DELETE, submit, and approve operations on individual invoices will fail with a Supabase relation error in production.

findings.title: commitments/[id]/invoices POST inserts with wrong FK column name
findings.description: POST handler inserts into owner_invoices using 'contract_id: parseInt(id)' but schema uses 'prime_contract_id' (UUID). Insert will fail or produce NULL FK. Also semantically wrong — passing commitment UUID as prime contract ID.

findings.title: No REVISE AND RESUBMIT status transition endpoint
findings.description: Procore has 'REVISE AND RESUBMIT' as first-class transition from UNDER REVIEW. No endpoint exists for this. Current PATCH blocks all non-draft edits so it cannot be used for status-only transitions.

findings.title: No billing period update, close, or delete endpoints
findings.description: Billing periods route only supports GET (list) and POST (create). No PATCH/DELETE. Cannot close a billing period — a key Procore workflow gate. billing_periods.status enum (open/closed/approved) and is_active cannot be changed via API.

findings.title: Billing periods route targets wrong table — contract_billing_periods instead of billing_periods
findings.description: Route queries contract_billing_periods (per-contract sub-period table) instead of billing_periods (project-level table linked by project_id). Billing Periods tab will show wrong data.

findings.title: No invoice attachments endpoints
findings.description: PO invoices manifest shows Attachments column. No attachment routes for owner invoices or commitment invoices. All other modules have dedicated attachment routes.

findings.title: Owner invoice list GET has no query-param filters
findings.description: GET /api/projects/[projectId]/invoicing/owner returns all invoices without filter params. Procore specifies Billing Period and Prime Contract filters. Frontend does client-side filtering on full result set — performance issue for any real project.

findings.title: No 'paid' status transition endpoint
findings.description: Owner invoice workflow includes 'paid' status. No endpoint to mark invoice as paid, record payment date, or track payment amount. PATCH blocks non-draft edits. Payment tracking is a placeholder (total_paid: 0).

findings.title: No invoicing export endpoint
findings.description: Procore subcontractor list has Export dropdown. No export route for invoicing data (no PDF, no Excel/CSV). Other modules have dedicated export routes.

findings.title: Commitment invoices endpoint returns SOV summary not discrete invoice records
findings.description: GET /api/commitments/[id]/invoices returns SOV billing summary from subcontract_sov_items/purchase_order_sov_items. Procore models PO invoices as discrete 'Invoices (Requisitions)' with 15 columns. No endpoints to create/list/update/delete individual commitment invoice records.

findings.title: PATCH blocks all non-draft edits — prevents REVISE AND RESUBMIT editing
findings.description: PATCH returns HTTP 400 for any non-draft invoice. In Procore's workflow, invoices in REVISE AND RESUBMIT status must be editable. A nuanced rule is needed to allow edits in that state.

findings.title: Legacy /api/invoices route targets Acumatica ERP table not app invoices
findings.description: GET/POST /api/invoices queries acumatica_ar_invoices. Creates a conflicting data model. Should be retired or clearly marked ERP-only.

findings.title: No project-level billing_periods table routes — Billing Periods tab unbuildable
findings.description: No routes target the billing_periods table (project-level). Cannot build the Billing Periods tab without this. billing_periods has project_id, name, start_date, end_date, status, is_active.

findings.title: Submit and approve routes lack precondition guards
findings.description: Submit does not check that line items exist. Approve does not verify invoice was previously submitted. Both allow status transitions from any current status without guards.

findings.title: No ERP sync status field in owner invoice list response
findings.description: Procore subcontractor list has ERP Status column. Owner invoice list GET response does not include erp_status field. No join to acumatica_ar_invoices to indicate sync status.

findings.title: Subcontractor Invoices tab entirely missing
findings.description: Tab shows 'coming soon' toast. This is half the invoicing tool. Procore has full subcontractor list with 5 filters, status bar (NOT INVITED, INVITED, UNDER REVIEW, APPROVED, REVISE AND RESUBMIT), ERP Status column, row selection, Export button.
findings.procore_behavior: Full subcontractor invoice list with 12 columns, 5 filters, status summary bar
findings.our_behavior: 'coming soon' toast — tab is a stub

findings.title: Owner invoice list columns are wrong — 6 Procore columns missing
findings.description: We show a single 'Amount' field. Procore shows Gross Amount, Net Amount, Paid Amount separately. Also missing: Company, Invoice Dates, Total Contract Amount, % Complete.
findings.procore_behavior: Columns: Invoice #, Status, Company, Billing Period, Gross Amount, Net Amount, Paid Amount, Invoice Dates, Contract, Total Contract Amount, % Complete
findings.our_behavior: Columns: Invoice #, Status, Billing Period, Amount, Contract (raw ID)

findings.title: Invoice status enum doesn't match Procore
findings.description: We use draft/submitted/approved/paid/void. Procore uses DRAFT/UNDER REVIEW/APPROVED/REVISE AND RESUBMIT. 'UNDER REVIEW' and 'REVISE AND RESUBMIT' don't exist in our status badge or DB enum.
findings.procore_behavior: Statuses: DRAFT, UNDER REVIEW, APPROVED, REVISE AND RESUBMIT
findings.our_behavior: Statuses: draft, submitted, approved, paid, void

findings.title: Owner invoice list filters wrong — has Status filter, missing Prime Contract filter
findings.description: Procore owner list has exactly 2 filters: Billing Period + Prime Contract. No status filter. We have Status filter only, missing Prime Contract filter.
findings.procore_behavior: Filters: Billing Period + Prime Contract

findings.title: Status summary bar absent from both invoice lists
findings.description: Procore has a clickable status summary bar showing counts per status above the table. We have a generic KPI row with different metrics.
findings.procore_behavior: Clickable status summary bar: DRAFT (N), UNDER REVIEW (N), APPROVED (N), REVISE AND RESUBMIT (N)
findings.our_behavior: Generic KPI row with Draft/Submitted/Approved/Paid counts (wrong labels)

findings.title: Invoice creation entry point is wrong — standalone /invoicing/new form instead of from commitment
findings.description: We have a standalone create form at /invoicing/new. Procore creates invoices from within commitment detail (Commitments > PO > Invoices tab > Create). Invoices are always linked to a specific commitment.
findings.procore_behavior: Create invoice from commitment detail > Invoices tab

findings.title: Invoice detail page uses deprecated layout pattern
findings.description: Uses ProjectPageHeader + PageContainer instead of PageShell. Violates the Page Layout Gate.
findings.procore_behavior: N/A

findings.title: Invoice detail has no tabs — should have 5 Procore tabs
findings.description: We show 3 flat cards. Procore detail has tabs: Invoice Details, Line Items, Approvals, Payments, Activity.
findings.procore_behavior: Tabs: Invoice Details, Line Items, Approvals, Payments Issued, Activity
findings.our_behavior: 3 flat cards: Invoice Information, Line Items, Notes

findings.title: Commitment Invoices tab shows summary instead of AIA G702/G703 requisition table
findings.description: InvoicesTab shows a billing progress summary. Procore shows the full 15-column SOV requisition table: Invoice Position, Invoice #, Invoice Dates, Billing Date, Status, Original Contract Sum, Net Change By Change Orders, Revised Contract Sum, Total Completed and Stored To Date, Total Retainage, Total Earned Less Retainage, Payment Due, Balance To Finish, % Complete, Attachments.
findings.procore_behavior: 15-column SOV requisition table (AIA G702/G703)
findings.our_behavior: Billing progress summary cards with SOV line items

findings.title: Billing Periods page uses mock data — no real API integration
findings.description: Page shows hardcoded mock periods. Create button is non-functional. No real data loaded.
findings.procore_behavior: Real billing periods with open/closed/approved status management
findings.our_behavior: Mock data only, Create button non-functional

findings.title: Billing Periods tab on invoicing list shows 'coming soon' toast
findings.description: Clicking Billing Periods tab fires a toast instead of showing billing periods.
findings.procore_behavior: Navigate to billing periods management view

findings.title: Create invoice form wrong shape — missing SOV line items, dates, attachments
findings.description: Missing: SOV line items section, invoice_date, due_date, attachments. Allows setting Approved/Paid status at creation time — should only allow Draft.
findings.procore_behavior: Create form: invoice #, billing period, invoice date, contract company, SOV line items, attachments
findings.our_behavior: Create form: billing period, prime contract, amount, status (any value allowed), notes

findings.title: Invoice detail line items table missing SOV columns
findings.description: Shows only Description/Category/Amount. Procore SOV table has: Scheduled Value, Work Completed From Previous Application, Work Completed This Period, Materials Presently Stored, Total Completed, % Complete, Balance to Finish, Retainage per line, Net Amount.
findings.procore_behavior: Full AIA G703 SOV column set per line item

findings.title: No approval workflow timeline or history on invoice detail
findings.description: Procore shows approval chain with timestamps, approver names, and status history. We have no approval history visible anywhere.
findings.procore_behavior: Approval timeline in Approvals tab with status changes, approver, timestamp, comments

findings.title: Due date hardcoded as created_at + 30 days
findings.description: Due date is a computed value in the display layer, not stored in DB and not editable. Procore has a real due_date field.
findings.procore_behavior: due_date is a real editable field

findings.title: Commitment detail RFQs, Payments Issued, Emails, Change History tabs are stubs
findings.description: 4 of 9 commitment detail tabs fire 'coming soon' toast. These are needed for full invoicing workflow context.
findings.procore_behavior: Functional tabs

findings.title: Contract column shows raw integer ID instead of contract name
findings.description: Invoice list Contract column displays a raw number instead of the contract number/name.
findings.procore_behavior: Contract name/number link

findings.title: No export capability — Export PDF button shows 'coming soon' toast
findings.description: Procore subcontractor list has Export dropdown. Our detail page Export PDF button fires a toast.
findings.procore_behavior: Export to PDF, Excel, CSV

findings.title: Billing Periods page uses deprecated DataTable component
findings.description: Uses DataTable/DataTablePage instead of UnifiedTablePage. Does not follow current table patterns.
findings.procore_behavior: N/A

findings.title: No payment recording UI — Payments Issued tab is a stub
findings.description: No UI to record that an invoice was paid. Payments Issued tab on commitment detail is a stub.
findings.procore_behavior: Payments Issued tab with payment records

findings.title: InvoicesTab on commitment detail uses legacy DataTable
findings.description: Uses DataTable instead of UnifiedTablePage pattern.
findings.procore_behavior: N/A

findings.title: Invoice edit form missing invoice_date and due_date fields
findings.description: Edit form has same gap as create form — missing date fields and allows bypassing approval workflow by directly setting status.
findings.procore_behavior: Edit form respects approval state

findings.title: Wrong primary CTA label
findings.description: Shows 'Create Invoice'. Procore's primary action on the list is 'Create Billing Period' with invoice creation happening from within commitments.
findings.procore_behavior: Create Billing Period button on list

findings.title: Commitment invoices tab heading should be 'Invoices (Requisitions)'
findings.description: Per AIA G702/G703 terminology, the tab should say 'Invoices (Requisitions)' as shown in the Procore PO invoice manifest.
findings.procore_behavior: Tab label: 'Invoices (Requisitions)'

findings.title: Retention rate hardcoded at 5%
findings.description: InvoiceLineItemsTable hardcodes 5% retention instead of reading from the contract's retention_percentage field.
findings.procore_behavior: Retention rate from contract

findings.title: No line item create/edit/delete UI
findings.description: All invoices created through UI will have 0 line items. No way to add/edit/delete line items from the UI.
findings.procore_behavior: Inline editable SOV line items per invoice
findings.our_behavior: Read-only line items table, no add/edit/delete

findings.title: Billing Periods breadcrumb links to wrong route
findings.description: Breadcrumb links to /invoices instead of /invoicing.
findings.procore_behavior: Correct navigation
